name: business-ops-suite
title: Business Ops Suite
description: Business-operations suite foundation: install-graph descriptor for the staff, scheduling, forms, training, compliance, and operational-dashboard lane.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/business-ops-suite",
  "lane": "business-ops",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.registry-foundation",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "button",
    "panel",
    "text-field",
    "data-list",
    "agent-panel",
    "business-ops-app",
    "business-ops-dashboard-page",
    "business-ops-staff-page",
    "business-ops-kpis-block",
    "business-ops-exceptions-block",
    "business-ops-agent-review-block",
    "business-ops-staff-table-block",
    "business-ops-training-form-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "business-ops-suite",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "button",
      "panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "business-ops-app",
      "business-ops-dashboard-page",
      "business-ops-staff-page",
      "business-ops-kpis-block",
      "business-ops-exceptions-block",
      "business-ops-agent-review-block",
      "business-ops-staff-table-block",
      "business-ops-training-form-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "staff",
    "scheduling",
    "forms",
    "training",
    "compliance",
    "operations-dashboard"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-09.suite-shell",
    "title": "Business Operations",
    "summary": "A dense operations shell for staff, schedules, forms, training, compliance, and operational dashboards.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.business-ops.shell",
      "layout": "ops-dashboard",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Dashboard",
          "route": "/business-ops/dashboard"
        },
        {
          "label": "Staff",
          "route": "/business-ops/staff"
        },
        {
          "label": "Scheduling",
          "route": "/business-ops/scheduling"
        },
        {
          "label": "Compliance",
          "route": "/business-ops/compliance"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/business-ops/dashboard",
        "page": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
        "title": "Operations dashboard",
        "blocks": [
          "block.business-ops.kpis",
          "block.business-ops.exceptions",
          "block.business-ops.agent-review"
        ]
      },
      {
        "path": "/business-ops/staff",
        "page": "page.business-ops.staff",
        "title": "Staff and training",
        "blocks": [
          "block.business-ops.staff-table",
          "block.business-ops.training-form"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
        "title": "Operations dashboard",
        "description": "Staffing, schedule exceptions, compliance signals, and display-only review actions.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "agent-panel",
          "button",
          "panel"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "page.business-ops.staff",
        "title": "Staff and training",
        "description": "Staff records, training status, and forms with invalid and empty states.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "text-field",
          "panel"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.business-ops.kpis",
        "title": "Operational KPIs",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.business-ops.exceptions",
        "title": "Schedule exceptions",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "empty",
          "error"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.business-ops.agent-review",
        "title": "Review queue",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.business-ops.staff-table",
        "title": "Staff records",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.business-ops.training-form",
        "title": "Training form",
        "component": "text-field",
        "stateExamples": [
          "invalid"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "panel",
      "text-field"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "A compliance exception with a long policy name wraps inside row cells and cards.",
      "empty": "No open schedule exceptions are announced as an empty operational state.",
      "error": "A review queue error is shown without retrying or executing harness actions."
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/suites/business-ops/suite-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "mounted-react-suite-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "source": "packages/ui/src/suites.mjs",
    "app": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/business-ops-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/pages/business-ops-dashboard-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/pages/business-ops-staff-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-kpis-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-exceptions-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-agent-review-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-staff-table-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-training-form-block.block.implementation.json"
    ]
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Suite shell now installs generated route/page/block/component descriptors from authored source; full React app implementation remains pending.
